note: Inter-group O_h vs d_local (k). Full k=4..10 sweep for the d_head-64 cluster (GPT-2, Qwen). For the d_head-128 cluster (Llama, Mistral) only k=7 + per-model-TwoNN points were collected (fine sweep not run). Confirms the cluster gap is a vertical offset of the whole O_h(k) curve, not a k=7 artifact.
verdict: The d_head-64 models share a common O_h(k) curve (cohesion <=0.022); the d_head-128 cluster is below it at every comparable k. Separation is a downward offset of the whole curve, robust to the choice of d_local.
